title: ADORATE
description:
ADORATE is a casual town-builder RTS where you take the role of an evil god amassing a cult of followers!

Summon your idol and defend it. Establish a home for your culties. Drain their life force to cast spells and fend off incoming holy forces. Unlock new powers by specialising your followers.

news.title: Abertay University announces student finalists for DARE Academy 2025
